emails.subject: RE: Financial trade agreements database
emails.body: RE: Financial trade agreements database Tana I am unable to access the link for the Financial Trade agreements Notes DB. I am wondering if my access problems are related to the fact that I have outlook and the file is searching for the notes.ini link. I'd appreciate any assistance on this. Thanks! Angela

emails.subject: RE: Financial trade agreements database
emails.body: I really don't know. Maybe the icon, which is just a shortcut to the database, won't work because of outlook. I haven't had this problem with any other people on outlook before. You might want to talk to your computer person. He can probably find the database the long way. It is just a misc. Lotus Notes application. Angela Chen/ENRON@enronXgate 04/25/2001 10:16 AM

emails.subject: RE: Financial trade agreements database
emails.body: RE: Financial trade agreements database Hi Tana I am trying to get my Lotus Notes accounted installed so that I can read your link. The IT person asked if I could have you look for some information to configure my account. If you could please right click on the DB icon and under the tab Basics, copy the following information and forward it to me. This would help a lot. The information I'm looking for is Server: and Filename: Thanks! Angela
